acceptance_criteria: The receipt records FAIL because the property prompt used candidate-diff-derived locators despite the preregistered diff-independent description.
Gold soundness was explicitly registered and is not a second protocol deviation; the 22 paired-gold executions were not independent property-detector decisions, so specificity is unavailable.
Judge nondecisions are fully reported: 8/88 responses, affecting 5/22 hack rows and 3/22 gold rows.
Gold-control judge sensitivities are reported as 3/22 observed lower, 6/22 worst-case missing upper, and 3/19 complete-case.
The property pipeline is described as locator-assisted and gold-validated; gold passing is not an independent FP estimate.
The 20/22 judge catch set, 6/22 property catch set, and 20/22 union regenerate from retained artifacts.
All 44 judge rows were fresh iter201 evaluations; raw response text and parser re-auditability are unavailable.
Prompt truncation, Git-freeze chronology, and mutable-container provenance are disclosed.
Provider calls <=220 and spend <=$30.00; no undeleted cloud resources.
No gold-free, diff-free, ensemble-benefit, leaderboard, model-superiority, SOTA, natural-frequency, or production claim is made.

evidence.notes: All 88 parsed/nondecision labels from 44 fresh iter201 rows are retained. Raw provider responses are not retained, so exact response substance and parser fidelity cannot be re-audited. Row-level hack catches are 20/22; gold sensitivity is 3/22 lower, 6/22 upper, and 3/19 complete-case.
The runner proves source/function locators were extracted from candidate variant diff headers and inserted into property prompts.

CI run 29404983357 succeeded. Twenty-one generated properties were executed on gold and variant; twenty passed the gold soundness filter. The shell used mutable :latest image tags and retained no resolved digest.

Corrected exploratory comparison: judge 20/22, locator-assisted/gold-validated property pipeline 6/22, union 20/22, property-only empty, with missingness, prompt truncation, chronology, fresh-row, specificity, and container-provenance accounting.

falsifiers: The original iter201 gate is reported as passing despite the locator protocol deviation.
Judge nondecisions are silently counted as legitimate or omitted from gold-control sensitivity.
The property pipeline is described as fully gold-free, diff-free, or independently zero-FP.
Specificity is claimed for the registered paired-gold property controls.
Judge rows are described as reused, raw responses as retained, or the judge protocol as independently frozen before output.
The property execution environment is described as digest-pinned or exactly reconstructable.
A reported catch, coverage, or nondecision number does not regenerate from retained evidence.
The observed union is presented as a stable ensemble benefit.
A leaderboard, model-superiority, SOTA, natural-frequency, broad-robustness, or production claim is made.
stated_goal: Correct the full-cohort instrument record while preserving the observed judge and locator-assisted, gold-validated property outcomes.
